title: KPI Tracking + Posture Reporting + Regulatory Tracker — Automated Digest
description: test_kpi_tracking_engine.py, test_security_posture_reporting_engine.py, and test_regulatory_tracker_engine.py cluster with test_cyber_threat_intelligence_engine.py. All three engines have solid CRUD and computation logic. Gap: KPI trend data is not auto-pushed to the executive dashboard, regulatory change alerts are tracked but not delivered to compliance owners, and CTI reports have no scheduled digest delivery.
missing: KPI digest scheduler: weekly email/Slack digest of KPI achievement % and direction vs last period, delivered via notification_engine
Regulatory change alert delivery: when regulatory_tracker records a new regulation change, auto-notify the assigned compliance owner with the delta and affected controls
CTI report TLP distribution: implement TLP-aware distribution so TLP:RED reports only go to CISO-level users, TLP:AMBER to team leads, TLP:WHITE to all
